有很多其他小说的影子   作者肯定看过猫腻这些  比较好的处理了感情戏 因为番茄会写感情戏的真不多 像这样简单处理就挺好的 虽然工业糖精味浓了点   其他的权谋这些就当乐子看吧"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751645957,"group_id":"7506002270404758552","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8jtDxPSIZeVFCKkpRZnYLE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/56df64312e264a53aa5eafc9f15713ea~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704498&x-signature=kZ9x%2FY3oVdRPz2wXca2cTulw5Nc%3D","user_id":"50669883594","user_name":"怪自己怪天气"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"50669883594","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1774685212,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7506002270404758552","book_info":{"abstract":"【慢热+种田+抄诗+权谋+江湖庙堂+美女】
陈小富穿越到大周王朝，成了开阳神将府的一个目不识丁的私生子。
坐拥花溪别院还有良田千顷，更主要的是还有一个倾国倾城善解人意的未婚妻。
没有狗血的退婚，陈小富对这日子很满意，本打算就这样逍遥快活一辈子，却不料那该死的才华令他一朝出名天下知。
陈小富从临安走入了帝京，走入了腥风血雨之中。
二皇子：“本宫只要陈小富的脑袋！”
东齐皇帝：“朕赏银十万金活捉陈小富！”
西楚九公主：“本宫不管，本宫就是要嫁给陈小富为妻！”
北魏太子：“命青衣楼所有杀手入大周，不杀陈小富，本宫寝食难安！”
陈小富看着大周女皇陛下：“他们都要我死，我若取天下，陛下怎么看？”
女皇：“朕给你三十万兵马！”
陈小富：“我的意思是这大周我也要。”
女皇顿时就乐了：“朕送给你又何妨！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a098cb1f2715af773ce34c8c0926be30","author":"堵上西楼","author_id":"","book_id":"7506002270404758552","book_name":"公子别装了，你就是诗仙转世","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8d8d0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7506014444019780632","read_count":"62332","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1402700"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"608","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,架空,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/859e5533a0b2d4309c40dbdd872e061c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779303884&x-signature=zyj%2BEj2eK7TBg64iGLOEaTI9sDc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"196"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032203044404415B351D509368B9AC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5714,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":16900},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_po
